description: Create a pursuit tracking experiment in PsychoPy Builder where a target circle (named 'target', size 0.1) follows a 600-frame trajectory defined in /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/assets/trajectory.csv. The experiment must include a routine named 'tracking' and a mouse component named 'tracker'. The target's color must dynamically change based on the 'tracker' position: Green when the distance is less than 0.05, and Red otherwise. The routine should terminate after the trajectory finishes. Save the experiment to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/pursuit_tracking.psyexp.
